events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flanged joints in progress, wrong gasket type/material for service. This is a sequence/procedure violation - using incorrect gasket material. Must fail. Need to state corrective actions before continuing.

  "decision": "fail",

    "Wrong gasket type/material installed for the specified service; gasket does not match engineered specification and ASME PCC-1/B16.5 requirements",
    "Flanged joint assembly proceeding with non-compliant gasket, creating leak/seal integrity risk under service conditions"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop bolting/assembly work on affected flanged joints immediately",
    "Identify and quarantine all incorrect gaskets from the work area",
    "Verify correct gasket type, material, class, and facing against engineered drawings and service specification",
    "Remove installed incorrect gasket(s), inspect flange faces for damage",
    "Install specified gasket and reassemble per ASME PCC-1 bolting procedure",
    "Document nonconformance and obtain QC/inspection acceptance before continuing"
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing a gasket not rated/approved for the service is a direct sequence and compliance violation; the joint cannot be completed or tested until the correct gasket is installed and verified. Work must halt and be corrected before proceeding.",

}
